creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text:
Update sysutils/abgx360 from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3. abgx360gui stays at 1.0.2.

From the changelog:
* Added full support for all current PFI/Video waves and the ability for future waves to be fully supported through updates to abgx360.dat
* The SplitVid check is now mandatory when checking an ISO/DVD and the "Check Stealth" option is enabled

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
